title: vangueria bowkeri
intro: Vangueria bowkeri, also known as the 'Karee Plum', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vangueria bowkeri include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and even alleviate symptoms of certain respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Vangueria bowkeri is often made into a tea or infusion, and its leaves and bark are used to create remedies for various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
